repo.title: GitHub - radix-ui/primitives: Radix Primitives is an open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps. Maintained by @workos. · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Radix Primitives
teaches: composable primitives for serious product UX
how strong accessibility infrastructure supports premium UI
avoid: assuming headless primitives provide a visual direction by themselves
overcomplicating simple product needs with unnecessary abstraction
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: A strong way to learn the interaction discipline behind polished interfaces.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: Premium-feeling UI still needs rigorous keyboard, focus, and state behavior underneath.
